name: claude-token-guard
description: Cut token burn on every Claude Code session — blocks expensive Explore/Plan agents and rewrites verbose Bash commands before they run

plugins.name: claude-token-guard
plugins.description: Two PreToolUse hooks: (1) blocks Explore/Plan/research agents in favour of targeted Grep/Glob/Read, (2) rewrites git log, npm list, pytest, gradlew to token-efficient equivalents
